final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for an original, non-infringing fragrance brand named "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an East-Asian ink-dyeing craft aesthetic with refined editorial presentation — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand standards sheet layout showing primary colors, secondary colors, and typography specimens in clear labeled sections
Subject: must include the brand identity system for "染秋 (RAN QIU)":
  Brand concept: 东方哲学 × 秋日诗意 × 传统"染"工艺美学
  Fragrance lines: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
  Key botanicals: 桂花 / 柿子 / 枫叶 / 乌龙茶 / 肉桂 / 檀香 / 琥珀
Scene/backdrop: needs a refined brand-book / style-guide backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic autumn atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must be derived from autumn seasonal botanicals — warm golds, burnt oranges, deep amber, muted sage, ink-dark accents — exact hex values and ratios are yours; palette must be displayed as labeled swatches with primary and secondary groupings
Materials/textures: needs a subtle paper / ink-wash texture evoking 染 (dyeing) craft — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色", and typography specimen labels for primary and secondary typefaces
Constraints: must preserve all Chinese brand names and fragrance line names verbatim; layout must clearly distinguish 主色 (primary colors), 辅色 (secondary colors), and 字体规范 (typography) sections
Avoid:
